import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)
        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0
        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)
        self.out = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)
        )
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):
        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)
        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)
        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        h, _ = self.gru(x)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        logits = self.out(h)
        return logits

class DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut_LN(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)
        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0
        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)
        self.out = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)
        )
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):
        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)
        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)
        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        h, _ = self.gru(x)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        logits = self.out(h)
        return logits

class DKT_Target_Features(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)
        self.attempt_emb = nn.Embedding(1000, 64)
        self.correct_attempt_emb = nn.Embedding(1000, 64)
        
        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2 + 128, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0)
        
        self.target_skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        
        self.out = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim + embed_dim + 128, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1)
        )
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, attempts, correct_attempts, next_skills, next_attempts, next_correct_attempts):
        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)
        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)
        
        attempts = torch.clamp(attempts, 0, 999)
        correct_attempts = torch.clamp(correct_attempts, 0, 999)
        a_emb = self.attempt_emb(attempts)
        ca_emb = self.correct_attempt_emb(correct_attempts)
        
        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb, a_emb, ca_emb], dim=-1)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        
        h, _ = self.gru(x)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        
        next_s_emb = self.target_skill_emb(next_skills)
        
        next_attempts = torch.clamp(next_attempts, 0, 999)
        next_correct_attempts = torch.clamp(next_correct_attempts, 0, 999)
        next_a_emb = self.attempt_emb(next_attempts)
        next_ca_emb = self.correct_attempt_emb(next_correct_attempts)
        
        out_in = torch.cat([h, next_s_emb, next_a_emb, next_ca_emb], dim=-1)
        logits = self.out(out_in).squeeze(-1)
        return logits
